description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.7-alpine Docker image. Define two stages, test and deploy. Add a test job that runs pip install -U sphinx then sphinx-build -b html . public, and is triggered on any commit where the branch name is not the default branch. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs the same two commands, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs when the commit is on the default branch.
